title: Users may be unable to access SharePoint Online sites and may notice delays or navigation errors
impact: Users may be unable to access SharePoint Online sites and may notice delays or navigation errors.

updates.content:
Title: Potential issues accessing SharePoint Online sites

User impact: Users may be unable to access SharePoint Online sites and may notice delays or navigation errors.

Current Status: We're investigating a potential issue and checking for impact to your organization. We'll provide an update within one hour.

Title: Users may be unable to access SharePoint Online sites and may notice delays or navigation errors

User impact: Users may be unable to access SharePoint Online sites and may notice delays or navigation errors.

Current status: We've determined that SharePoint Online may not be processing service traffic as efficiently as expected. We're reducing the amount of traffic that can flow through the impacted environment as a potential method of remediating impact. This should complete by our next scheduled update.

Scope of impact: Any user attempting to access SharePoint Online sites may be impacted.

Next update by: Monday, June 29, 2026, at 5:00 PM UTC
